introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Jose, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As the largest city in the Bay Area by population and the heart of Silicon Valley, San Jose sees thousands of accidents annually on its busy expressways and freeways. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our San Jose car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions, T-bone accidents at expressway intersections, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents (especially tech-related distractions), rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and accidents involving autonomous vehicle testing.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in San Jose
sections.body: San Jose's unique mix of tech commuters and dense suburban traffic creates specific risks on highways like I-280, US-101, SR-85, SR-87, and expressways such as Capitol Expressway and Almaden Expressway. Common causes include distracted driving by tech workers on devices, speeding on wide expressways, fatigued driving from long Silicon Valley work hours, and complex multi-lane merges. Our attorneys investigate every accident thoroughly.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in San Jose?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene with photos, exchange information with other drivers, get witness contact info, file a report with San Jose PD or CHP, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. If an autonomous vehicle was involved, additional evidence preservation is critical.

faq.question: How much is my San Jose car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages including stock compensation and tech industry earnings, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Silicon Valley incomes often mean higher economic damages. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the high stakes of San Jose and Silicon Valley injury cases and fight for compensation that reflects the true economic impact on tech professionals and their families.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Jose, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
